productDisplayName: Lotto Men Court Classic V Blue Shoes
description: Designed for the Sports junkie who never compromises on style and comfort, the Court Classic V shoe from lotto comes with a durable upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you stable on various surfaces.UpperSynthetic upper with overlays on the forefoot and rearfoot with perforations on the midfoot areaCentral lace-ups with a padded tonguePadded mesh inner with a soft footbedBranding printed on the tongue and embossed on the heel collarOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe region to act as the toe guardMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole witgh a curved midfootPunto Flex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementExaggerated herringbone grooves all overShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
